message:
test(robot_overview): harden unlock-maximizer regression to allow top_pick surfacing

The test added in 2abdb95 asserted
`output.unlock_maximizers[0].id == "UNLOCK_KING"`, but in practice triage
picks UNLOCK_KING as top_pick on this fixture (it's actionable,
priority=1, and actionable items of any priority beat fully blocked ones
in triage). The dedup in build_robot_overview_output then filters
UNLOCK_KING out of unlock_maximizers, so the previous assertion failed
with:

    assertion `left == right` failed: got HUB_B
      left: "HUB_B"
     right: "UNLOCK_KING"

The fix asserts the real invariant: UNLOCK_KING appears in exactly one of
top_pick / fronts / unlock_maximizers (never zero, never duplicated).
Adds a sanity check against `advanced_insights().top_k_set` to keep the
"highest marginal_unlocks comes first" property as a separate assertion,
and validates claim_command formatting for every returned maximizer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
